tool.name: nmap_scan
tool.description: Perform a port scan using nmap. Automatically parses output into structured data with hosts, ports, services, and versions.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: IP address, hostname, or CIDR range to scan (e.g., "192.168.1.1", "example.com", "10.0.0.0/24")

parameter.name: scan_type
parameter.description: Type of scan to perform: - quick: Fast scan of top 100 ports (-F) - standard: Default nmap scan with service version detection (default) - comprehensive: All 65535 ports + version + OS detection - stealth: SYN scan (-sS) - requires root - udp: UDP scan (-sU) - requires root

returns.description: Structured results with: - success: boolean - hosts: list of discovered hosts with ports, services, versions - scan_info: scan metadata - raw_output: first 3000 chars of raw nmap output for evidence

tool.name: nmap_vuln_scan
tool.description: Run nmap with vulnerability detection NSE scripts to find known vulnerabilities.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: IP address, hostname, or CIDR range to scan

returns.description: Vulnerability findings from NSE scripts with title and details
